instruction: Help me organize the NPS data into the memo

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Customer Group'
ws['B1'] = 'Survey Count'
ws['C1'] = 'Promoters(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'Passives(%)'
ws['E1'] = 'Detractors(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Enterprise Clients'
ws['B2'] = 520
ws['C2'] = 62
ws['D2'] = 25
ws['E2'] = 13
ws['A3'] = 'Individual Users'
ws['B3'] = 1850
ws['C3'] = 45
ws['D3'] = 32
ws['E3'] = 23
ws['A4'] = 'Agents'
ws['B4'] = 280
ws['C4'] = 58
ws['D4'] = 28
ws['E4'] = 14
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/nps_survey.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the NPS data into the memo

Find the customer group with the highest promoter percentage from /home/user/Desktop/nps_survey.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/nps_memo.txt: 'Best NPS Customer Group: Enterprise Clients (Promoters 62%)', save

include: Best NPS Customer Group: Enterprise Clients (Promoters 62%)
